case_title: MONZO, CATHERINE ANN vs. CABLE CAR ADVERTISERS, INC. A CA. CORP.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONZO, CATHERINE ANN AS TO DEFENDANT CABLE CAR ADVERTISERS, INC. A CA. CORP.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONZO, CATHERINE ANN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CABLE CAR ADVERTISERS, INC. A CA. CORP. $1,920.00 PRINCIPAL, $93.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,013.00
